ticket.subject: Welcome to Shopify Partner PluginHive! We’re here to help you save both time and money
ticket.raw_subject: Welcome to Shopify Partner PluginHive! We’re here to help you save both time and money
ticket.description:
Hello Parth,

 Greeting from Shopify Partner PluginHive!

 Thank you for installing our Shopify App - **“PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App”** on 1e0fd4.myshopify.com

 Our team would like to assist you with the complete app onboarding.

 We request you let us know a suitable time for the onboarding session, which will not take more than 10 mins. Feel free to reply to this email (or) share your contact number, we will get in touch with you.

 You can also refer our documentation to set up the app and start shipping - click here to know more

 Looking forward to hearing from you.

 Thanks and Regards,
 Team PluginHive
https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team

comments.body:
Hello Parth,

Greetings from PluginHive!

I am Touseef from the PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label app. Thank you for installing the app.

We observed that you have not added any Shipping Carrier Account with the app yet. Please let us know if you are facing any difficulty.

We can also provide a free Onboarding for the app over a Zoom call to help you with the app setup and answer your queries. Please let us know your availability for the same.
Alternately, please **CLICK HERE** to schedule a call as per your availability.

Hope to hear from you soon.

*****New Carrier Update*****
Amazon Shipping is now available in India through PluginHive, offering reliable delivery and competitive rates. Register your interest in Amazon Shipping today!
_Sharing a quick video that shows how to integrate and ship using Amazon Shipping with the app_
_https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LxVRoh5A-S0_

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Parth,
 
Greetings from PluginHive!
 
I am Touseef from the PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label app. Thank you for installing the app.
 
We observed that you have not added any Shipping Carrier Account with the app yet. Please let us know if you are facing any difficulty.
 
We can also provide a free Onboarding for the app over a Zoom call to help you with the app setup and answer your queries. Please let us know your availability for the same.
Alternately, please CLICK HERE to schedule a call as per your availability.
 
Hope to hear from you soon.
 
***New Carrier Update***
Amazon Shipping is now available in India through PluginHive, offering reliable delivery and competitive rates. Register your interest in Amazon Shipping today!
Sharing a quick video that shows how to integrate and ship using Amazon Shipping with the app
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LxVRoh5A-S0
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Request #381915 "Give Multi Carrier Shipping Labe..." was closed and merged into this request. Last comment in request #381915:

Hello Parth,

 We regret that you had to uninstall our Shopify App - **“PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App”** from 1e0fd4.myshopify.com

 If you have faced any difficulties with the app, we can hop on a call to assist you. Or if you are awaiting your store launch, do let us know so we can extend your free trial period.


> **Did you know?**
>
> - _Our shipping app is certified by top shipping carriers like UPS, FedEx, USPS, Stamps.com, DHL Express, Australia Post, Canada Post, Post Nord & many more._
> - _This app will allow you to ship with multiple carrier(s)._
> - _Print 100 (s) of shipping labels in a single click._
> - _Our shipping experts will provide you with quick and reliable support._



 Let’s schedule a quick call to discuss how exactly we can help you reach your shipping requirements.

 We would like to hear from you.

 Thanks and Regards,
 Team PluginHive
https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team
comments.html_body:
Request #381915 "Give Multi Carrier Shipping Labe..." was closed and merged into this request. Last comment in request #381915:

Hello Parth,

We regret that you had to uninstall our Shopify App - “PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App” from 1e0fd4.myshopify.com

If you have faced any difficulties with the app, we can hop on a call to assist you. Or if you are awaiting your store launch, do let us know so we can extend your free trial period.

Did you know?

  • Our shipping app is certified by top shipping carriers like UPS, FedEx, USPS, Stamps.com, DHL Express, Australia Post, Canada Post, Post Nord & many more.
  • This app will allow you to ship with multiple carrier(s).
  • Print 100 (s) of shipping labels in a single click.
  • Our shipping experts will provide you with quick and reliable support.

Let’s schedule a quick call to discuss how exactly we can help you reach your shipping requirements.

We would like to hear from you.

Thanks and Regards,
Team PluginHive
https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team
